---
layout: null
permalink: /llms-full.txt
---
# Denny Huang Talks Full Data

## Topics

{% assign topics = site.topics | sort: "title" %}
{% for topic in topics %}
### {{ topic.slug }} / {{ topic.title }}

- ID: {{ topic.slug }}
- URL: {{ topic.url | absolute_url }}
- Summary: {{ topic.summary }}
- Aliases: {{ topic.aliases | join: ", " }}

{% endfor %}
## Slides

{% assign slides = site.slides | sort: "title" %}
{% for slide in slides %}
{% assign related_events = site.events | where_exp: "event", "event.slides contains slide.slug" | sort: "date" | reverse %}
{% assign latest_event = related_events | first %}
{% assign video_event_count = 0 %}
{% for related_event in related_events %}
{% if related_event.videos and related_event.videos.size > 0 %}
{% assign video_event_count = video_event_count | plus: 1 %}
{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% assign related_date_groups = related_events | group_by_exp: "event", "event.date | date: '%Y-%m-%d'" %}
### {{ slide.slug }} / {{ slide.title }}

- ID: {{ slide.slug }}
- URL: {{ slide.url | absolute_url }}
- Original: {{ slide.external_url }}
- First presented: {{ slide.first_presented }}
- Latest presented: {% if latest_event %}{{ latest_event.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}{% else %}N/A{% endif %}
- Latest event: {% if latest_event %}{{ latest_event.path | split: "/" | last | remove: ".md" }}{% else %}N/A{% endif %}
- Video event count: {{ video_event_count }}
- Language: {{ slide.language }}
- Topics: {{ slide.topics | join: ", " }}
- Aliases: {{ slide.aliases | join: ", " }}
- Related events: {% assign related_emitted = 0 %}{% for date_group in related_date_groups %}{% assign date_events = date_group.items | sort: "sequence" %}{% for event in date_events %}{% assign event_id = event.path | split: "/" | last | remove: ".md" %}{% unless related_emitted == 0 %}, {% endunless %}{{ event_id }}{% assign related_emitted = related_emitted | plus: 1 %}{% endfor %}{% endfor %}
- Summary: {{ slide.summary }}

{% endfor %}
## Event Records

{% assign events = site.events | sort: "date" | reverse %}
{% assign date_groups = events | group_by_exp: "event", "event.date | date: '%Y-%m-%d'" %}
{% for date_group in date_groups %}
{% assign date_events = date_group.items | sort: "sequence" %}
{% for event in date_events %}
{% capture event_date_text %}{% include event-date.html event=event format="full" %}{% endcapture %}
{% assign event_id = event.path | split: "/" | last | remove: ".md" %}
### {{ event.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }} / {{ event_id }} / {{ event.title }}

- ID: {{ event_id }}
- Date: {{ event.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
{% if event.end_date %}- End date: {{ event.end_date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
{% endif %}- Date text: {{ event_date_text | strip }}
- Sequence: {{ event.sequence | default: "" }}
- Event: {{ event.event }}
- URL: {{ event.url | absolute_url }}
- Event URL: {{ event.event_url }}
- Role: {{ event.role }}
{% capture role_label %}{% include role-label.html role=event.role %}{% endcapture %}
- Role label: {{ role_label | strip }}
- Language: {{ event.language }}
- Topics: {{ event.topics | join: ", " }}
- Slides: {{ event.slides | join: ", " }}
- Has videos: {% if event.videos and event.videos.size > 0 %}true{% else %}false{% endif %}
- Videos: {% for video in event.videos %}{% unless forloop.first %}, {% endunless %}{{ video.label | default: video.url }} <{{ video.url }}>{% endfor %}
- Links: {% for link in event.links %}{% unless forloop.first %}, {% endunless %}{{ link.label | default: link.url }} <{{ link.url }}>{% endfor %}
- Summary: {{ event.summary }}

{% endfor %}
{% endfor %}
